title: Karpatiosorbus devoniensis
taxonomy: Karpatiosorbus devoniensis belongs to the family Rosaceae, which includes other rose-like plants and fruits such as apples and pears. It is a species of flowering plant within the genus Karpatiosorbus. This genus is a part of the larger group of plants known as the dicotyledons, characterized by having two cotyledons or seed leaves. Karpatiosorbus devoniensis is also classified as a deciduous shrub or small tree. Its classification is further supported by its morphology and molecular characteristics.
constituents: Karpatiosorbus devoniensis is a plant that is part of the Sorbus genus. Unfortunately, I do not have information on the specific active constituents found in this plant.
